mapper.select: SELECT * FROM news ORDER BY news_id DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT news_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO news ( news_id, title, content, writer, reg_date, view_count, important ) VALUES ( #{news_id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer}, SYSDATE, 0, #{important} )
mapper.update: UPDATE news SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, published_date = #{published_date}, writer = #{writer}, important = #{important} WHERE news_id = #{news_id}
